caption: A man wearing a black sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters and a white baseball cap sits in a studio setting. He wears headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repeating logo with five gold stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE." A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his left is a black equipment case, and to his right is a small container with a red and white label that says "BOSS TALK ONE". The man is positioned in profile, facing toward the right side of the frame. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and attire, with only slight shifts in his facial expression and mouth movements as he continues to speak.
